title: Job Opening Teacher at SRM University

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at SRM University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at SRM University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About SRM University:
SRM University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University!
